Show ONLY this one item and its own container (one bowl, one plate, or one cup/glass) — absolutely no additional bowls, plates, side dishes, rice, or extra cups in frame. If this item is a beverage, the entire frame must contain nothing but that single cup or glass of the beverage. 卤味小吃视觉风格：深红酱色调，柔和暖光，传递卤香浓郁、街头卤味的诱人氛围。 无骨鸭脖: 去骨鸭脖肉，深酱色码放.

seriesStyle: 卤味小吃视觉风格：深红酱色调，柔和暖光，传递卤香浓郁、街头卤味的诱人氛围。
bannerImagePrompt: Professional food-delivery-app restaurant banner photograph, wide horizontal composition, warm inviting natural lighting, shallow depth of field, appetizing commercial food photography style, no visible text/logos/watermarks, no people/hands, subject centered with generous negative space margin around it (to survive a wider crop), consistent warm natural color grading. 卤味小吃视觉风格：深红酱色调，柔和暖光，传递卤香浓郁、街头卤味的诱人氛围。 画面主体是一份色泽酱红的卤味拼盘，摆放在盘中，主体居中，四周留足够空白以适应裁切。
